world.name: Aethoria
world.lore:
Welcome to AETHORIA — a continent shaped by ancient magic and forgotten wars.

Long ago, the Arcane Cataclysm tore the sky open for seven days and seven nights,
leaving behind ley-lines of wild mana that pulse through mountain, forest, and sea.
The Great Kingdoms rose and fell atop these ley-lines, and the scars of those
civilizations are still visible in crumbling ruins and cursed dungeons scattered
across the land.

Today, an uneasy peace holds among the city-states. Adventurers roam freely,
seeking fortune and glory — or simply trying to survive in a world where the next
monster, war, or natural disaster is never far away.

The current era is called the Age of Embers: old powers are fading, new ones are
rising, and destiny waits for those bold enough to seize it.

grid.name: Frostpeak Summit
grid.description: A jagged mountain crowned with eternal ice.

grid.name: The Grey Pass
grid.description: A treacherous alpine pass haunted by wind spirits.

grid.name: Skyveil Monastery
grid.description: A cliffside monastery where monks study the ley-lines.

grid.name: Ironvein Mine
grid.description: A deep mine rich in enchanted ore — and old curses.

grid.name: Stormwatch Keep
grid.description: A fortress overlooking the northern sea.

grid.name: Thornwood
grid.description: A dense forest that hums with restless magic.

grid.name: Ashenvale
grid.description: Charred woodland recovering from a decade-old wildfire.

grid.name: Silverbrook
grid.description: A prosperous trading town built on a swift silver river.

grid.name: Goblin Warrens
grid.description: A network of tunnels teeming with mischievous creatures.

live_traces.text: Perrin Nightshade は Goblin Warrens から負傷して戻った（1008年）。

grid.name: Eastwatch Tower
grid.description: A lone watchtower staffed by a rotating ranger garrison.

grid.name: Elderroot Forest
grid.description: An ancient forest whose trees remember the Cataclysm.

grid.name: Millhaven
grid.description: A quiet farming village known for its legendary apple wine.

grid.name: Aethoria Capital
grid.description: The grand capital — heart of trade, politics, and intrigue.

grid.name: Sunken Ruins
grid.description: Ruins of a pre-Cataclysm city, half-swallowed by the earth.

live_traces.text: Jorin Underhill は Sunken Ruins から負傷して戻った（1001年）。
Nissa Ashwood は Sunken Ruins から無事に帰還した（1004年）。

grid.name: Saltmarsh
grid.description: A fishing village where sailors whisper of sea monsters.

grid.name: Dragonbone Ridge
grid.description: A ridge littered with the bones of ancient dragons.

grid.name: Dusty Crossroads
grid.description: A well-worn junction where merchants rest and rumours spread.

grid.name: Hearthglow Town
grid.description: A warm, welcoming town renowned for its healers' guild.

grid.name: Mirefen Swamp
grid.description: A murky swamp hiding both treasure and terrible dangers.

live_traces.text: Gwynne Ironforge & Isara Yarrow & Nissa Ashwood は Mirefen Swamp から負傷して戻った（1010年）。

grid.name: Dawnport
grid.description: A busy harbour city that never truly sleeps.

grid.name: Sunbaked Plains
grid.description: Vast golden plains scorched by an unrelenting sun.

grid.name: Sandstone Outpost
grid.description: A small desert outpost at the edge of the known world.

grid.name: The Verdant Vale
grid.description: A lush valley sheltered from harsh winds — a true paradise.

grid.name: Obsidian Crater
grid.description: A massive crater from the Cataclysm, still faintly glowing.

grid.name: Coral Cove
grid.description: A hidden cove home to a secretive community of sea-mages.
